stories: Good morning Sean, it's Thursday, the fourteenth of May 2026
Fun fact: on this date in 1796, Edward Jenner administered the world's first smallpox vaccination to an eight-year-old boy
That single act eventually led to the complete eradication of smallpox — the only human disease ever fully wiped out
Monthly One-on-One at eight-thirty on Webex, then L5 Monthly MOP and MIP on Teams at nine until half ten
ERP Strategic Roadmap for the Platform at ten on Webex
At eleven, 1SAP Lite Feedback via Webex, then AIP 2 alignment on Teams at half eleven
After lunch, L5 Integrated Plan, Capacity and Demand plus FY27 Roadmap at one in the Respect room
ERP Roadmap for Operational Functions Technology at two on Webex
Good morning Sean, it's Wednesday the thirteenth of May 2026
Fun fact to kick off: no US President has ever died in May
Every other month has claimed at least one â making May the safest month in American political history
Bi-monthly catch-up with Rahul on Teams at ten until quarter to eleven, then lunch blocked from noon
It's the first major criminal action in what was one of the most dramatic maritime disasters in recent years
On finance, parliament is debating the Securities and Futures Amendment Bill to enable a joint Singapore-Nasdaq global listing board
And Singapore received a strong FATF rating for its financial crime framework
The global headline is Trump departing for Beijing today for a May 14-15 summit with Xi Jinping, travelling with Elon Musk and Tim Cook
Good morning Sean, it's Tuesday, the twelfth of May
Today is International Nurses Day Ã¢ÂÂ and the birthday of Florence Nightingale, born two hundred and six years ago today
She didn't just modernise nursing; she also invented the rose diagram to make mortality data compelling to politicians
The world's first healthcare data storyteller
You kick off at nine with the T400 Briefing on FY2027 Annual Improvement Priorities on Webex, with the Meridian Risk Workshop overlapping from nine-thirty
From ten to eleven-thirty it's L4 EAS MOP and MIP on Teams, then straight into the weekly PwC integration
The afternoon has the ERP Finance Roadmap and L3 EAS Ops MOP from two-thirty, L5 Growth AIP feedback at three, and Zain revision wrapping the day from four to six
On Singapore: two residents are in isolation at the National Centre for Infectious Diseases after exposure to the Andes hantavirus aboard the MV Hondius cruise ship
